summary: Tested student status management end-to-end. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests passed against /api/student-status/* (stats, single change, bulk change, history, RBAC, invalid status, level downgrade for repeat). Frontend: /student-status-manager page loads with 5 colored stat cards, filters render, 91 student rows show, 'select-all' triggers bottom action bar, action modal exposes all 5 status options + level + reason + apply, history modal opens and displays prior changes. All data-testid selectors present and functional.

minor.issue: Response model omits the new fields (status, graduation_date, expulsion_date, frozen_at) that are written by /student-status/{id}/change. Data IS persisted in DB (verified via /student-status/stats showing graduated=1 immediately after a change). Frontend mainly reads from list/stats so user flow not blocked, but any consumer expecting current status on the detail endpoint will see it missing.

issues: Hero header (الـ banner البنفسجي) yo'verlaps the page title/header at the top right corner (in RTL the menu/search icons partially overlap 'إدارة حالات الطلاب' label in the top bar). Minor visual clip.
Level filter chips labels render right-to-left as 'م1, م2 ...' but tab strip baseline shows underline ('p' shape) bleeding into row below — purely cosmetic.
History modal title is 'سجل حالات: {اسم}' instead of 'تاريخ تغييرات الحالة' from spec (label-only, non-blocking).

action_items: (Minor) Include status, graduation_date, expulsion_date, frozen_at in the GET /api/students/{id} response model so the detail endpoint reflects the latest student state.
(Cosmetic) Adjust hero/header layout overlap on /student-status-manager and align history modal title with the spec wording.
critical_code_review_comments: student_status.py router is well-scoped, RBAC enforced via Depends(require_permission(...)), history persisted in dedicated collection 'student_status_history'. Good separation.
_apply_status_change correctly sets is_active=false and the date markers (graduation_date / expulsion_date / frozen_at). For 'repeat' it preserves is_active=true and supports new_level downgrade.
Bulk endpoint returns per-item ok/false results and aggregate success_count/failed_count — clean contract.
Consider also returning current 'status' field in GET /api/students/{id} (currently stripped by the Pydantic response model).
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Test data only modifies student status of existing students; cleanup restores first student to 'active'. History records remain in student_status_history (expected, append-only audit log).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend route prefix is /api/student-status (NOT /api/students/). The GET /api/students/{id} response model strips student_status fields — known minor issue, not a blocker. Frontend page uses Expo router at /student-status-manager and has full data-testid coverage: search-input, select-all, student-{id}, hist-{id}, open-action, opt-{status}, action-level, action-reason, apply-bulk. Login form selectors: input[placeholder='اسم المستخدم'], input[placeholder='كلمة المرور'], text='تسجيل الدخول'.
rca of the issue: GET /api/students/{id} missing new fields — RCA: the Pydantic Student response model in the main students router was defined before status workflow was added; new fields written directly to Mongo by student_status router are not declared on the response schema, so FastAPI's response_model serialization drops them. Fix: add Optional[str] status, Optional[datetime] graduation_date / expulsion_date / frozen_at to the Student response model (or use response_model_exclude_none=False with the fields added).
